---
id: list-extension-statistics
title: "List extension statistics"
description: "Returns extension-level call statistics for the specified domain."
sidebar_label: "List extension statistics"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/v1/fs-pbx-api
custom_edit_url: null

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List extension statistics"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/extension-statistics"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns extension-level call statistics for the specified domain.

Access rules:
- Caller must have access to the target domain (domain scope).
- Caller must have the `xml_cdr_view` permission.

Pagination (cursor-based):
- Both `limit` and `starting_after` are optional.
- If `limit` is not provided, it defaults to 50.
- If `starting_after` is not provided, results start from the beginning.

Optional filters:
- `search` filters by extension number, extension label, and related call fields.
- `date_from` and `date_to` filter the reporting window using epoch seconds in UTC.
- If no date range is provided, the current day in the domain's local timezone is used.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"limit","description":"Optional. Number of results to return (min 1, max 100). Defaults to 50.","example":50,"required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Optional. Number of results to return (min 1, max 100). Defaults to 50.","example":50}},{"in":"query","name":"starting_after","description":"Optional. Return results after this extension UUID.","example":"c9a76140-0ca4-4ea3-95af-7e12c2ff0df5","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Return results after this extension UUID.","example":"c9a76140-0ca4-4ea3-95af-7e12c2ff0df5"}},{"in":"query","name":"search","description":"Optional. Search extension number, label, and related call fields.","example":"1001","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Search extension number, label, and related call fields.","example":"1001"}},{"in":"query","name":"date_from","description":"Optional. Start of date range in epoch seconds (UTC).","example":1777507200,"required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Optional. Start of date range in epoch seconds (UTC).","example":1777507200}},{"in":"query","name":"date_to","description":"Optional. End of date range in epoch seconds (UTC).","example":1777593599,"required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Optional. End of date range in epoch seconds (UTC).","example":1777593599}},{"in":"path","name":"domain_uuid","description":"The domain UUID.","example":"7d58342b-2b29-4dcf-92d6-e9a9e002a4e5","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
